summary: Iteration 3 full testing: backend APIs + all new UI features verified. All major features pass.

ui_bugs.issue: React known quirk: `muted` boolean attr not reflected as HTML attribute (get_attribute returns None). Video IS muted visually via JS property. Not a functional bug.
